title: bridge.task-request
description: What the desktop cockpit asks the engine sidecar to run as a governed task. Carries no lease, no key, no environment (mirrors bro_supervisor.TaskRequest).

request.description: Canonical request envelope (design §2.2): the desktop nonce + request hashes the supervisor/signer binds a receipt to, so a Wave 3b receipt can satisfy the desktop's request_nonce / request_sha256 bindings. Carries no lease/key/environment.

protected_scope.description: Exact paths only (no glob metacharacters), per bro_supervisor.TaskRequest.
